summary: Adds generated content to an output structure, either plain or annotated with original-source metadata when available.
signature_intent: Accepts an optional source-mapping record and a generated content segment, then records the segment in the current output node.
behavior: Appends the content without metadata when no usable mapping is provided.
Appends the content with original line, column, source reference, and name metadata when a usable mapping is provided.
Uses a configured base reference to qualify the attached source reference when one is available.
edge_cases: Null mapping information is treated as absent.
Mapping information without a source reference is treated as absent.
Missing optional name metadata is passed through as absent.
forbidden_details: Original identifier names are intentionally omitted.
Repository and source file locations are intentionally omitted.
Low-level construction details are intentionally omitted.
